hero.subtitle: Mercato is a community-built cost-of-living index. Anyone, in any country, submits a local price for bread, rent, transport, utilities. Peers verify on-chain. Everyone involved earns cUSD.

howItWorks.step1Title: Pick the product, type the price.
howItWorks.step1Body: Choose a product from the basket, pick your country, type the price you actually paid. Receipt photo is optional. One on-chain transaction, with the network fee paid in cUSD if your wallet supports it.
howItWorks.step2Body: Other contributors in the same country vote ✓ or ✗ on pending submissions. Three matching positives finalize the price and unlock rewards for everyone involved in the round.
howItWorks.step3Body: Micro-rewards accumulate for every accepted submission and every verification you cast on someone else's. Sweep the balance to MiniPay or any Celo wallet in one claim. Any time, no minimum.

artifacts.submissionFooter: one tx · cUSD fee · receipt optional

basketPreview.subtitle: Each bar measures how much of the {total}-product basket has at least one verified price in that country. Tap a row for the full country breakdown.

empty.body: Mercato launches at zero submissions. Be the first to add a price in your country, and the rest of the basket builds itself.

heroRanking.title: Bread · milk · transit
heroRanking.buildingBody: Building the comparable basket. As soon as one country has bread, milk, and transit priced, it shows up here.
heroRanking.partialBody: One more product, one more country into the ranking.
heroRanking.emptyBody: Add the first price for bread, milk, or transit. The ranking seeds itself from there.

meta.title: Item {barcode}
meta.description: Median price, recent submissions, and pending verifications for this item across the Mercato community.

recent.title: Recent submissions
recent.empty: No submissions yet for this barcode.

notFound.title: Couldn't open this item.
notFound.body: Either the barcode in the URL is malformed (we expect 12 bytes of hex with a 0x prefix), or no one has submitted a price for it yet. Scan it yourself to start the feed.

rewards.notConnected: Connect your wallet to see pending rewards and claim history.
rewards.wrongNetwork: Mercato is not deployed on this network yet. Switch to a supported chain.

lifetimeClaimed.title: Lifetime claimed
lifetimeClaimed.claimsCount: {count, plural, one {# claim} other {# claims}} on record.

verifications.title: Verifications
verifications.body: Votes you cast on other submissions.

howRewards.title: How rewards work
howRewards.body: Each accepted submission earns {submitter} cUSD once it gathers three consistent verifications. Each verification on an accepted submission earns {verifier} cUSD.
howRewards.accumulate: Rewards accumulate inside the contract until you claim, one transaction sweeps the full balance to your wallet.
howRewards.valuesNote: Values are read directly from the deployed PriceOracle, so they always match the active chain.

claim.title: Pending rewards
claim.emptyHint: Nothing to claim yet, submit a price or verify others' submissions to earn.
claim.toastSuccessDesc: Funds are on their way to your wallet.

index.body: Daily median prices submitted and verified by the community. Each basket sums the median price for {count} canonical goods in local currency: bread, rent, transport, utilities. Click a row for the per-product breakdown.

detail.summary: Median basket total of {value} {currency} across {filled} of {total} canonical products.
detail.emptyBody: The basket here is empty. Be the first to add a price.

empty.body: Mercato launches at zero submissions in every country. Pick a product, pick your country, type a price, the index starts building itself.

scan.connectPrompt: Connect your wallet at the top right to submit. The form below works in preview mode without a wallet.

form.title: Add a price to the basket
form.subtitle: Pick a product, your country, the price you paid.

country.label: Country
country.currencyHint: Currency follows your country: prices in {currency}.

success.title: Submission #{id} accepted on-chain.
success.body: Waiting for community verification (3 votes needed). Reward will appear on your /rewards page once finalized.

errors.unsupportedFile: Unsupported file type {type}. Use JPEG, PNG or WebP.

privacy.metaDescription: Mercato privacy policy: what we collect, what we don't, and what's permanent on-chain.

collect.body: We do not run any user accounts, email lists, analytics trackers, or third-party advertising scripts. We do not ask for your name, phone number, location, or any other personal identifier. The web app is a thin client over the on-chain contract.

onchain.intro: Two things become permanent, public, and unalterable the moment you submit a transaction:
onchain.wallet: Your wallet address. Every blockchain transaction includes it by design. If your wallet is otherwise linked to your real-world identity, that link applies here too.
onchain.submissions: Your submitted price observations and votes. Product slug, country code, price in cents, optional receipt-image hash, timestamp, and which submissions you verified. This is the project's whole point: open data for an open cost-of-living index.
onchain.outro: We cannot delete on-chain data on your behalf. No one can. Treat anything you submit as permanent and public.

hosting.body: The site is hosted on Vercel, which (like every web host) processes request metadata such as IP address, user agent, and request path to deliver the page. We do not read, export, or otherwise process those logs ourselves. See <link>Vercel's privacy policy</link> for their handling.

cookies.body: Mercato does not set its own cookies. Your wallet provider (e.g. MiniPay, MetaMask, Rainbow) may store state in your browser as part of normal wallet operation; that storage is controlled by your wallet, not by us.

rpc.body: The site reads on-chain data through public RPC endpoints (Celo Forno) and may link to public block explorers (Celoscan, Blockscout). Those services see standard request metadata; the same disclosure as Vercel above applies.

receipts.body: When a user attaches a receipt photo to a submission, the image is stored on Vercel Blob storage and content-addressed by hash; the hash is also stored on-chain. Photos are only fetched when someone views that specific submission. Photos can't be removed once the on-chain hash exists.

contact.body: For privacy questions, security disclosures, or removal requests for off-chain content (the receipt photos mentioned above), open an issue on the <link>project repository</link>.

terms.metaDescription: Mercato terms of service: open-source community price index on Celo.

what.body: Mercato is a community-built consumer-price index on the Celo blockchain. Anyone can submit a local price for an everyday product. Other contributors vote ✓ or ✗ on submissions. After three matching positive votes the submission is finalized and stored on-chain as a price observation. The full source code is MIT-licensed and lives at <link>github.com/BRN-SLP/mercato</link>.

warranties.body: Mercato is provided as-is, with no warranties of any kind. The smart contract is immutable in its current logic: its source is verified on <link>Celoscan</link> so you can inspect it before interacting. You are responsible for any transaction you submit. We make no claim that any submitted price is accurate; consensus only proves that three peers agreed, not that the price reflects reality.

rewards.body: The contract pays small cUSD rewards to submitters and verifiers from a fixed seed pool funded by the project. The pool is finite. When it is depleted, the reward-distribution path inside the contract will revert with InsufficientPoolBalance; submissions and verifications still work but no payouts occur. There is no guarantee of any specific reward amount or payout schedule.

use.honest: Submit prices you have actually observed. Spam, fraudulent or coordinated submissions are not welcome and will be voted down by the community.
use.noattack: Do not attempt to attack, overload, or game the contract or this site. Security disclosures: open an issue on the GitHub repo above.
use.permanent: All submitted price observations become public on-chain data the moment they are mined. Treat anything you publish as permanent and public.

opendata.body: All price observations submitted via Mercato are released into the public domain (CC0). Anyone can read, copy, fork, or build on the data: that is the entire point of the project.

changes.body: These terms may change as the project evolves. The current version is always the one served at this URL.

medianChart.empty: No accepted submissions in the last 30 days yet.
